dataset.domain: synthetic NYC taxi-style forecasting problem suite

cartoboost_auto_forecast.auto_selector_policy: auto uses the lag spine unless shared validation clears the source-specific gain and consistency guards; non-M inner validation skips raw auto and non-M outer scoring materializes raw auto only when selected; non-M inner validation stops after one origin when lag beats every finite candidate by at least 15%; rolling-origin suites cache identical inner validation cutoffs by source, cutoff, and candidate roster
cartoboost_auto_forecast.native_covariate_policy: use route static covariates, training-gated low-cardinality integer-coded covariate indicators, and covariate-calendar interactions including event-flag interactions only when enabled by the source-specific benchmark config
cartoboost_auto_forecast.native_ewm_feature_policy: EWM target features are available but disabled by default after validation showed route-mix regression without candidate gating
cartoboost_auto_forecast.native_feature_policy: season-aware lags, complete rolling means, optional MLForecast-style partial rolling means, lag deltas, and rolling trends capped to the shortest training series
cartoboost_auto_forecast.native_target_mode_policy: delta_from_last when season_length == 12, horizon == 13, or horizon >= 24; level otherwise
cartoboost_auto_forecast.native_tree_regularization_policy: use at least max_depth=5 and at most min_samples_leaf=6 when horizon >= 24 or season_length == 4; otherwise use configured values

cartoboost_lag.auto_selector_policy: auto uses the lag spine unless shared validation clears the source-specific gain and consistency guards; non-M inner validation skips raw auto and non-M outer scoring materializes raw auto only when selected; non-M inner validation stops after one origin when lag beats every finite candidate by at least 15%; rolling-origin suites cache identical inner validation cutoffs by source, cutoff, and candidate roster
cartoboost_lag.native_covariate_policy: use route static covariates, training-gated low-cardinality integer-coded covariate indicators, and covariate-calendar interactions including event-flag interactions only when enabled by the source-specific benchmark config
cartoboost_lag.native_ewm_feature_policy: EWM target features are available but disabled by default after validation showed route-mix regression without candidate gating
cartoboost_lag.native_feature_policy: season-aware lags, complete rolling means, optional MLForecast-style partial rolling means, lag deltas, and rolling trends capped to the shortest training series
cartoboost_lag.native_target_mode_policy: delta_from_last when season_length == 12, horizon == 13, or horizon >= 24; level otherwise
cartoboost_lag.native_tree_regularization_policy: use at least max_depth=5 and at most min_samples_leaf=6 when horizon >= 24 or season_length == 4; otherwise use configured values

dataset.domain: daily NYC taxi-style pickup/dropoff lane demand
dataset.problem_description: Airport pickup/dropoff lanes receive repeated day-of-month surges.

dataset.domain: daily NYC taxi-style pickup/dropoff lane demand
dataset.problem_description: Pickup borough codes drive repeated monthly taxi-demand pulses.

dataset.domain: daily NYC taxi-style pickup/dropoff lane demand
dataset.problem_description: Longer routes and airport lanes have horizon-relevant route-mix swings.

dataset.domain: daily NYC taxi-style pickup/dropoff lane demand
dataset.problem_description: Weekly lane demand with slow drift and deterministic airport events.
